title: Oreo's Mod
description: A mod that adds a bunch of cursed , cool and dumb stuff I though of while learning how to mod .
body:
# Oreo's mod

Do you have a weird obsession with the famous clash royale youtuber Ken ? 

Do you want to harness the power of Ken through various tools, magic staffs , armour and even guns ?

## Boy do I have the mod for you !

With Oreo's Mod you can have that and much more !
You get to see the product of a person with a weird obsession with a youtuber trying to make an interesting/coherent mod .

This mod is naturally about as coherent as my english.

## So what does this mod add to my gameplay experience ?
### Here is a comrehensive list of everything this mod adds

- A new Villager Job to obtain all of the cursed cosmetic blocks.
- A new job block (block of Nyx) for the villager Job.
- A new block that makes a sound when right clicked and deals damage when stood on (Sound Block).
- Various cursed cosmetic blocks (along with their item for crafting) .

- A custom ken block along with a ken stair , slab , button , pressure plate , fence , fence gate ,door , trapdoor and wall .

- Custom ken ore that can be smelted into ken ingots
- New ken tools , armour , staffs , a shield and even guns ! All craftable with ken ingots + extra materials . 

- A crock pot to craft custom foods with various effects .

- New music discs
- A dice to test your luck with

- And a metal detector to make ken ore hunting easier 

![A tab with all the items added in this mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf40e2e18f7f1492a65dfb7e095823ba5d437d51.png)


## Before you start playing 
This mod **Reuqires** Fabric Shield Lib  to work make sure to download it and add it to your mods : [https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricshieldlib](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricshieldlib)

I would also strongly recommend using REI (Roughly Enough Items) as this mod was made with it in mind : [https://modrinth.com/mod/rei](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei)

## If you want to play this mod with Sodium
Make sure you have indium installed otherwise your game wont launch: 
[https://modrinth.com/mod/indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)


# Have fun
